overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a western-themed video game showing a character in cowboy attire walking along a wooden dock at night, boarding a houseboat, and exploring the deck. The clip ends with a cut to two characters sitting in a muddy alley beside a brick building.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden dock at night, flanked by water on both sides. A large houseboat is moored to the left, while the destination houseboat with a gangplank lies ahead. The sky is overcast with patches of moonlight breaking through.

events.description: character steps from the dock onto the sloped wooden gangplank

agents.ego_description: walking up the wooden gangplank to board the houseboat

wooden deck surface of the houseboat with railings
steep wooden staircase leading to the upper deck

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the gangplank leading to the houseboat. The dock falls away behind as the character approaches the boat's main deck, with wooden stairs visible leading to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: houseboat deck with seating area and fire pit

segments.scene_description: On the houseboat deck, the character explores a cozy seating area centered around a burning fire pit. Another character sits nearby. The camera pans to reveal the moonlit harbor with distant illuminated buildings across the water, while the canvas awning provides partial shelter overhead.

segments.scene_description: The scene cuts to a narrow muddy alley between buildings where two characters sit against a brick wall beside a wagon wheel. The ground is wet and muddy, with a distant fire glowing down the road. Wooden buildings line the right side of the alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a moonlit waterfront boarding a houseboat to a sudden shift into a gritty, muddy alleyway. It begins with a character walking along a narrow wooden dock flanked by water under an overcast sky, moving steadily toward a moored houseboat. As the character ascends the gangplank, the dock recedes and the perspective opens onto the boat's main deck, leading toward a cozy seating area centered around a burning fire pit. The camera then pans across the moonlit harbor and distant illuminated buildings beneath a canvas awning before abruptly transitioning to a narrow, wet alley. Finally, the scene settles between brick buildings where two characters sit against a wall beside a wagon wheel, with a distant fire glowing down the muddy road.
